action.reasoning: Observation: local Qwen debug produced systematically wrong x‚Čą1‚Äď3 px predictions, but stdout was truncated before raw generations and the eval container may not have /data/base_model, forcing heuristics. Analysis: two root causes must be separated before training: (1) prompt/parser/model invocation may be extracting bogus numbers locally; (2) eval may need the base model packaged in checkpoint. Decision: inspect current model invocation and run a compact raw-generation probe with several Qwen grounding prompt formats on a few labeled val examples, logging raw outputs to a file for diagnosis.
